review_comment:
What do you think about having the string "all" as a possible value for this param to replace `module_ctx.use_all_repos` (similarly for dev deps)?

The obvious downside is the weird typing, but the advantage of this is that we remove some mental burden and _if_ we were to have other fields on ExtensionMetadata later on, it's more composable.

yeah. now the question is where to put this as_module_extension thing :)

also notable that use_all_repos is implementable in terms of the "all" thing, but not vice versa. Mostly due to the composability point.
Result of an offline discussion: We will go for `"all"`, but realize a wrapper for the simple use case of a WORKSPACE macro either in skylib or Bazel itself.
